rationale: DIM1 (band=1): Treatment case; output gives misstatement_probability=55, which falls in 50<=p<70 → 1 per rubric. DIM2 (=1): Top-ranked hypothesis targets Revenues/AccountsReceivableNetCurrent/Allowance with direction 'overstated' — correct account area (revenue overstatement matches the key's 'overstated revenue by approximately $50 million'). However, the proposed treatment type is 'premature/aggressive revenue recognition or delayed write-off of receivables' inferred from AR-vs-revenue divergence; the actual scheme per 33-10692 was improper valuation of non-monetary data-exchange (barter) transactions ($34.5M) plus undisclosed linked/side-agreement monetary contracts (~$12M). The treatment type does not substantially match, so score stays at 1 (account area + direction, but not treatment). Coverage note (multi-mechanism truth): neither of the two truth components (barter valuation, side agreements) is captured by any of the three hypotheses; the FY2013 focus also predates the manipulation window (2014-02 to 2016-02). DIM3 (mixed vs active → 1): The top hypothesis narrative blends an active scheme (premature/aggressive revenue recognition) with an omission/estimate element (delayed write-off of receivables; allowance not scaling with AR). Mapped genre = mixed; answer-key genre = active(revenue); one-sided-vs-mixed → 1. DIM4 (=3): Evidence citations are concrete provided data points with accession numbers that genuinely support the claims (e.g., AR 68,348,000→90,040,000 vs Revenues 255,193,000→286,860,000 for the DSO divergence; NetIncomeLoss vs operating cash flow for FY2011/FY2012/FY2014; the 10-day 10-Q→10-Q/A gap in May 2013; $0 allowance quarters in 2015 against $77-98M AR). The reasoning coherently combines multi-year and multi-account series (AR/revenue growth mismatch across FY2012-FY2013, NI-vs-OCF divergence across 2010-2014, quarterly allowance anomalies in 2015), meeting the bar for 3. Consistency rule: p=55 with risk_tier='elevated' satisfies 40<=p<70 => watch/elevated, so no cap applies. MEMORIZATION_SUSPECT_CONDITION2 = false: the reasoning points at specific provided data content (not bare document lists), and nothing references post-cutoff facts — no mention of the SEC order, restatement, revelation, or outcome.
